cloud_function.description: Specifies the Cloud Function to which the IAM member will be assigned. Must be in the format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/functions/{function_name}`.

condition.description: Defines an optional condition for the IAM binding, specifying when the binding applies. Must include title, expression, and optionally description.

member.description: Specifies the identity (user, group, service account, or domain) to be granted the defined role.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member, such as roles/cloudfunctions.viewer.
